## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New article/post
- [ ] Content update
- [ ] Layout/template change
- [ ] CSS/style change
- [ ] Accessibility improvement
- [ ] Navigation/site structure change
- [ ] Documentation/workflow change
- [ ] Bug fix

## Publishing Checklist

- [ ] Build passes
- [ ] Filename/front matter are correct, if this adds or changes a post
- [ ] Categories match established category names
- [ ] Description is present for posts/pages that need previews
- [ ] No manual subscribe/share/support footer was added inside a post
- [ ] No secrets, private keys, tokens, or private personal information were added

## Accessibility Checklist

- [ ] Links use meaningful text
- [ ] Images have useful alt text or are decorative
- [ ] Keyboard focus/navigation still works
- [ ] Mobile tap targets are still comfortable
- [ ] Reduced-motion users are not forced into unnecessary movement
- [ ] Plain-language summary considered, if the post is long or dense
- [ ] Content note considered, if the post discusses difficult material

## QA Notes

- [ ] Checked on mobile
- [ ] Checked on desktop
- [ ] Dark/light mode still readable
- [ ] Read-aloud still works on post pages, if relevant
- [ ] Share and Save as PDF still work, if relevant
- [ ] Contact/support/subscribe links still work, if relevant

## Additional Notes

Add anything reviewers or future-you should know.
